scripts.build:apk:
node scripts/set-cap-prod.js && npm run build && npx cap sync android && export JAVA_HOME=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && cp app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk ../HotelPuntaGaleria.apk && echo '
✅ APK LISTO: HotelPuntaGaleria.apk
'
scripts.deploy:apk: npm run build:apk && adb install -r HotelPuntaGaleria.apk && echo '✅ APK instalado en el dispositivo'
